tweet.text:
Honored to join so many great athletes before us in the Rutgers Athletic Hall of Fame!!!
Two star recruits who accomplished what they wanted and more on the banks.
Mom always said it’s not where you start, it’s where you finish! https://t.co/BY6LFdjvSp

The more you can do…
#LifeAfterFootball https://t.co/OeeDfsrJXE
